name: Hearty Spam Breakfast Skillet
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Frozen diced or shredded potatoes
1/4 medium Green bell pepper, cut into 1-inch thin strips
1/4 medium Red or yellow bell pepper, cut into 1-inch thin strips
1 can SPAM Luncheon Meat, cut into julienne strips (12 oz)
1 can Frozen fat-free egg product, thawed, OR 4 Eggs
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large non-stick skillet, cook potatoes, onion, and peppers in oil over medium-high heat for 5 minutes, stirring constantly.
2. Add SPAM; cook and stir for an additional 5 minutes.
3. In a small bowl, combine egg product, basil, salt, pepper, and hot pepper sauce; blend well.
4. Pour the mixture over the contents of the skillet. Cover.
5. Cook over medium-low heat for 8-12 minutes or until set.
6. Sprinkle with cheese; remove from heat.
